data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access, but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this behavior. While there are multiple passed steps related to offers and bookings, none of them explicitly address the auditability of membership tiers or their access at the time of booking. Therefore, it is not possible to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence of auditability of tier at time of access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auditability of tier at time of access.
